# fix(runtime): address review findings — watchdog loop= deprecation + progress orphan wiring

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `3883d93b3e10` — fix(runtime): address review findings — watchdog loop= deprecation + progress orphan wiring

**Body**:

Security review M1: replaced asyncio.ensure_future(loop=self._loop)
with self._loop.create_task() — the loop= parameter was deprecated
in Python 3.10 and scheduled for removal.

Code review MUST-FIX: ProgressRegistry was an orphan — _current_progress_registry
context var was never set in production. Now wired into LocalRuntime:
__init__ creates the registry, _execute_async sets the context var
before node execution, resets in cleanup. Exposed as
runtime.progress_registry property so callers can register callbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
